displayTitle: Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 2 – The Enemy On All Sides
synopsis: Collects (not listed in reading order) Star Wars: General Grievous (2005) #1-4, Star Wars: Jedi (2003) Yoda, and Star Wars: Republic (2002) #55-60, 62, & 64-68
title: Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 2 – The Enemy On All Sides
